label: Selective state-space models (Mamba family)

node.label: Selective state-space models (Mamba family)
node.definition: Input-selective state-space blocks combine recurrent linear-time scaling with content-dependent propagation.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Selective state-space models (Mamba family) is to connect Selective state-space scan, State-space transitions to downstream capabilities including Time-series forecasting, anomaly & fraud detection, Transformer–SSM & recurrent hybrid models.
examples: substrate for Time-series forecasting, anomaly & fraud detection
substrate for Transformer–SSM & recurrent hybrid models
limitations: Its inductive bias, data demand, optimization behavior, and compute profile can make it unsuitable outside the regimes where it was validated. Its direct dependencies include Selective state-space scan, State-space transitions.
